---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or hardware monitoring capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

What feature would you like to see?

## Use Case

What's the real-world scenario? Who would use this and why?

## Hardware Metrics (if applicable)

Which metrics should be monitored?

- [ ] GPU (NVIDIA)
- [ ] GPU (AMD)
- [ ] Disk I/O
- [ ] Network traffic
- [ ] GPU memory
- [ ] Temperature
- [ ] Other: ___

## Priority

How important is this to you?
- [ ] Must have
- [ ] Should have
- [ ] Nice to have
